revision.comment: Sync from repo need_translation/ [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24615006798|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:日置神社 (高島市)]] {{Expand Japanese|日置神社 (高島市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hioki Shrine (Q11510250) | native_name = 日置神社 (高島市) | image = T-hioki-jinja.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hioki Shrine (Q11510250) | coordinates = {{coord|35.4325|136.009833}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hioki Shrine'''|日置神社 (高島市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}} ** Series ordinal: 1353 * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181904 * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181904 ** Series ordinal: 1363 * {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigesha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigesha|qid=Q135038714}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181904 * {{ill|Shikinai Supershrine|lt=Shikinai Supershrine|qid=Q135419779}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477}} ** Series ordinal: 124 ** P155: {{ill|Tomoyuhino Shrine|lt=Tomoyuhino Shrine|qid=Q135039880}} ** P156: {{ill|Tsunono Shrine|lt=Tsunono Shrine|qid=Q135039881}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|lt=Takashima|ar|تاكاشيما (شيغا)|azb|تاکاشیما، شیقا|ceb|Takashima|ce|Такасима|de|Takashima (Shiga)|en|Takashima, Shiga|eo|Takaŝima|es|Takashima (Shiga)|fa|تاکاشیما، شیگا|fi|Takashima|fr|Takashima|gl|Takashima|id|Takashima, Shiga|it|Takashima|ja|高島市|ko|다카시마시|mzn|تاکاشیما، شیگا|nl|Takashima|pl|Takashima|pt|Takashima (Shiga)|ro|Takashima, Shiga|ru|Такасима|sv|Takashima|tg|Такашима|th|ทากาชิมะ|tl|Takashima, Shiga|tr|Takashima|tt|Такасима|uk|Такасіма (Сіґа)|vi|Takashima, Shiga|war|Takashima, Shiga|zh-classical|高島市|zh_min_nan|Takasima-chhī|zh_yue|高島|zh|高島市|qid=Q845794}} * {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882}} * {{ill|Takashima District, Shiga|lt=Takashima district|en|Takashima District, Shiga|fa|بخش تاکاشیما، شیگا|ja|高島郡 (滋賀県)|zh|高島郡 (滋賀縣)|qid=Q11669692}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.4325|136.009833}} == image (P18) == * T-hioki-jinja.JPG == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181904 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3160005007815 == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Sakanami Shrine|lt=Sakanami Shrine|qid=Q135193765}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181904 ** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Hioki Shrine|lt=Hioki Shrine|qid=Q135193764}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181904 ** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}} ==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigesha]] [[Category:Shikinai Supershrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[JA:日置神社 (高島市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11510250}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|日置神社 (高島市)|version=107291034|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Need translation]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 日置神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:T-hioki-jinja.JPG|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}今津町酒波855 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|25|57.0|N|136|00|35.4|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = {{jalink|素盞嗚命}}
日置宿禰命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|郷社}} |創建 = {{jalink|垂仁天皇|Q314850}}朝 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|三間社流造}} |別名 = 岩剣大神 |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月18日|Q2521}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=日置神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''日置神社'''（ひおきじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}今津町酒波（さなみ）にある神社である。{{jalink|式内社}}{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社}}。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚命}} * {{jalink|日置宿禰命}} == 神紋 == * 十六枚菊 == 歴史 == 往古、酒波岩劔大菩薩と呼ばれていた。河上郷の惣社である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）に郷社に列した。 == 社家 == 神職は、布留宮家が代々世襲する。 == 祭礼 == * 例祭（川上祭）4月18日 == 文化財等 == * 五輪石塔 - 関白頼道塔と呼ばれる。高さ8尺。 == 周辺 == * {{jalink|酒波寺|Q11644336}} * 梅原日吉神社 * {{jalink|弓削神社 (高島市)|Q11487078|弓削神社}} * 今津総合運動公園 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1338 日置神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Need translation]]
